samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO implementation with configurable depth and width.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data input.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="WIDTH">Data width configuration parameter.</constant>
        <constant id="DEPTH">FIFO depth configuration parameter.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        // Define the dual-port RAM instance here
        <instance id="ram_inst">
            <module_ref id="dual_port_RAM"/>
            <connection id="wclk" src_module_id="ram_inst" dest_module_id="this_module" dest_port_id="wclk"/>
            <connection id="wenc" src_module_id="ram_inst" dest_module_id="this_module" dest_port_id="wen"/>
            <connection id="waddr" src_module_id="ram_inst" dest_module_id="this_module" dest_port_id="waddr"/>
            <connection id="wdata" src_module_id="ram_inst" dest_module_id="this_module" dest_port_id="wdata"/>
            <connection id="rclk" src_module_id="ram_inst" dest_module_id="this_module" dest_port_id="rclk"/>
            <connection id="renc" src_module_id="ram_inst" dest_module_id="this_module" dest_port_id="ren"/>
            <connection id="raddr" src_module_id="ram_inst" dest_module_id="this_module" dest_port_id="raddr"/>
            <connection id="rdata" src_module_id="ram_inst" dest_module_id="this_module" dest_port_id="rdata"/>
        </instance>
        
        // Define the write pointer register here
        <reg id="waddr_bin" width_description="[3:0]">Binary representation of the write pointer.</reg>
        <always_comb>
            if (winc && !wfull) begin
                waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
            end else begin
                waddr_bin <= waddr_bin;
            end
        end
        
        // Define the read pointer register here
        <reg id="raddr_bin" width_description="[3:0]">Binary representation of the read pointer.</reg>
        <always_comb>
            if (rinc && !rempty) begin
                raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
            end else begin
                raddr_bin <= raddr_bin;
            end
        end
        
        // Define the write pointer buffer register here
        <reg id="wptr_buff" width_description="[3:0]">Buffer register for the write pointer.</reg>
        <always_comb>
            wptr_buff <= wptr;
        end
        
        // Define the read pointer buffer register here
        <reg id="rptr_buff" width_description="[3:0]">Buffer register for the read pointer.</reg>
        <always_comb>
            rptr_buff <= rptr;
        end
        
        // Define the write pointer synchronizer register here
        <reg id="wptr" width_description="[3:0]">Synchronized write pointer.</reg>
        <always_comb>
            wptr <= wptr_buff ^ (wptr_buff >> 1);
        end
        
        // Define the read pointer synchronizer register here
        <reg id="rptr" width_description="[3:0]">Synchronized read pointer.</reg>
        <always_comb>
            rptr <= rptr_buff ^ (rptr_buff >> 1);
        end
        
        // Define the read pointer synchronized register here
        <reg id="rptr_syn" width_description="[3:0]">Synchronized read pointer.</reg>
        <always_comb>
            rptr_syn <= rptr;
        end
        
        // Define the write pointer synchronized register here
        <reg id="wptr_syn" width_description="[3:0]">Synchronized write pointer.</reg>
        <always_comb>
            wptr_syn <= wptr;
        end
        
        // Define the full signal here
        <assign id="wfull" value="(wptr == {~rptr[3], rptr[2:0]}) ? 1 : 0"/> 
        
        // Define the empty signal here
        <assign id="rempty" value="(rptr == wptr_syn) ? 1 : 0"/>
        
        // Connect the input and output signals to the dual-port RAM instance here
        <assign id="wen" value="winc & ~wfull"/>
        <assign id="ren" value="rinc & ~rempty"/>
        <assign id="waddr" value="waddr_bin[2:0]"/>
        <assign id="raddr" value="raddr_bin[2:0]"/>
        <assign id="wdata" value="wdata"/>
        <assign id="rdata" value="rdata"/>
    </logic_description>
    
    <implementation>
        // Implement the dual-port RAM module here
        <module id="dual_port_RAM">
            <description>Dual-port RAM implementation.</description>
            <ports>
                <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
                <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
                <input id="wenc">Write enable signal.</input>
                <input id="renc">Read enable signal.</input>
                <input id="waddr" width_description="[3:0]">Write address.</input>
                <input id="raddr" width_description="[3:0]">Read address.</input>
                <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data.</input>
                <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data.</output>
            </ports>
            
            <parameter_description>
                <constant id="WIDTH">Data width configuration parameter.</constant>
                <constant id="DEPTH">FIFO depth configuration parameter.</constant>
            </parameter_description>
            
            <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
                // Define the memory array here
                <reg id="RAM_MEM" width_description="[DEPTH][WIDTH-1:0]">Memory array for storing data.</reg>
                
                // Define the read data output here
                <assign id="rdata" value="RAM_MEM[raddr]"/>
                
                // Define the write operation here
                <always_comb>
                    if (wenc) begin
                        RAM_MEM[waddr] <= wdata;
                    end
                end
            </logic_description>
        </module>
    </implementation>
</module>

TopModule.sv:27:        : Padding 3 high bits of the port.
TopModule.sv:27: warning: Port 7 (raddr) of dual_port_RAM expects 4 bits, got 1.
TopModule.sv:27:        : Padding 3 high bits of the port.
